item.description: Wooh! Thanks for the fake internet points - I’m saving up for something nice! Is it still a myth that front page gets you boobs in your inbox ?! Always worth asking !!!
item.dc:creator: GiddyKipper

item.title: Another mediocre meme dump pt 11 (Video)
item.description:
I don’t know why I saved all the videos for one dump, this was a terrible idea Part 11 of whatever it takes to empty out my phone.
“Anyway here’s Wonderwall”
This is so cursed. I don’t even know what’s going on.
Cat tax. My wild child Maylene with a new floppy fish toy.
Double cat tax. Stinky as a baby. Circa Jan 2017 For those of you who need more memes: Pt 10: https://imgur.com/gallery/IXG5Kek Pt 9: https://imgur.com/gallery/JXM1eCu Pt 8: https://imgur.com/gallery/Ke5NzeP Pt 7: https://imgur.com/gallery/Y2rvJyq Pt 6: https://imgur.com/gallery/6rEEEH3 Pt 5: https://imgur.com/gallery/SwFgHwb Pt 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/bkj2EDi Pt 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/Gzae8C6 Pt 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/DciDY01 Pt 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/q9jvH2j
Ok ONE more cat tax. Every night at around 10-11pm Maylene has Taco Time, which is just her walking around with this specific cat toy and yowling. It’s so cute.
item.dc:creator: madcraftapothecaries

item.title: They see me rollin ... but wheeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: Requested Update: I Landed Safely. Thank You, IMGUR.
item.description:
I still can’t believe (that since 2018) IMGUR has helped me beat homelessness, found me a vehicle, boosted my art sales when needed, and is now still here offering to support my baby sister and nephew during this dark and transformative time. I made a post a week ago- asking for help to come and visit while she recovers- to help with my nephews caretaking. Immediately you all flew me out here and made sure we had a nice meal and a snazzy outfit to come home to. A true blessing. Then you guys take it a step further and boost a post to MV- all the while assembling a wishlist of work from home / baby supplies to help my sister with. (For those wondering how to help - you can find a PayPal, an IMGUR created Amazon wishlist, an email for an etransfer or gift card, and an address to write to - all in my profile’s “about section” - which IMGURIANS helped me put together. Thank you so much for helping during this dark and transformative time)
This was only my 2nd time flying- eek talk about nerve racking! It was* fun, though. I really enjoyed having a window seat- it greatly improved the flying experience.
Ugh swallowing the fear here goes! Turned out to be just fine- and quite fun. Turbulence? I’m not into it!
https://imgur.com/gallery/nY00JxT My sister has an opportunity to work from home- and is living in a space she can’t afford without a partner / the income assistance she’s pending approval for. She just needs a helping hand during this transition. Read thru the comments and sentiments on that post for a smile.
Robbie was gifted a couple of surprises from an imgurian. They were ordered online and waiting for in store pick up. They included a few soothers (NUK) and this absolutely adorable Easter outfit. What a handsome young man! Thank you, from the bottom of my heart, to each and every one of you who sent kind words or reassurance and kind sentiments. They did not go unnoticed and they will be cherished. I hope that we can send my sister a few dollars - and that we can equip her house with the needs. I hope everyone had a happy Easter and his having an excellent start to their weekend! Cheers from the bottom of Canadas Arctic circle.
item.dc:creator: coastalabstracts

item.title: Imgur recently
item.description: I've seen a lot of comments lately, where someone asks a question and instead of an answer, they get insulted. You should never be mocked for not knowing something and then wanting to expand your knowledge. And if you don't want to answer somebody's question then simply don't answer instead of belittling them. Come on imgur we are better than that.
item.dc:creator: timewasterdeluxe

item.description: Cajun Daddy Blackened Bison Patty, Tobacco Onions, Pepper Jack Cheese, Chipotle Aioli From Prime 16 Tap House + Burgers In New Haven, Connecticut Previous Day 329: https://imgur.com/gallery/U4Fyc6q MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD @CrisprCAS Daily Tag
item.dc:creator: crypto

item.title: Well…shit.
item.description: #cheater #military #lies. I had pictures of them in bed together, an email from the man admitting it, pictures of her with her second guy (Third? Fourth?), an email from the other man’s wife…but because I didn’t have pictures of a penis entering a vagina…they can’t do anything. It’s all hearsay. I’m completely broken. Lost faith in the military…can’t sleep. She ruined two families and will skate through the fire unscathed. Fuck all of this.
item.dc:creator: TheHushHushAccount

item.title: Born one month before the war, and killed by a russian rocket at just three months old.
item.description:
This woman and her three-month-old baby were killed by russian rockets in Odesa today. The woman's mother died in the strike as well.
Source in Ukrainian: https://detector.media/community/article/198653/2022-04-23-vid-rosiyskoi-rakety-v-odesi-zagynula-piarnytsya-valeriya-glodan-iz-trymisyachnoyu-dochkoyu/ Killed woman's instagram: https://instagram.com/underwonderwow?igshid=YmMyMTA2M2Y= Photos from her husband's Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/yury.glodan.7/posts/pfbid0aKquwCRQ3emS3vDvCBTT1L3WRqJJRxYxdhW1ggDZYaNcVAamg8e9d6nAMBkLjARCl

item.dc:creator: dogearwyrde

item.title: A good outcome from a bad situation
item.description: We had to move cross country. Due to the pandemic there was simply no way to get him across the country by airplane or professional pet mover short of paying absurd sums of money and drastically altering our already complex travel arrangements. Our only choice was to have him in the carrier the entire six day long drive. Due to his health problems and serious anxiety that was considered a non starter, he wouldn’t survive the rigors of the journey. So, with heavy hearts we sent him to a cat rescue that specializes in kitties with behavior and health problems, of which he had both. We reached out to them recently, a year later, and found out they matched him with an elderly widow who by all accounts takes good care of him and treats him like a prince. Makes me happy.
item.dc:creator: LordOfZajo
